title: Low Carb Grilled Spiced Salmon
instructions:
Preheat the grill or grill pan over medium-high heat and oil as necessary to prevent sticking.
Combine all the ingredients except for the salmon. Spread a thin layer over all sides of the salmon.
Grill over medium high heat for 4-5 mins. per side or until cooked through.
Grilled Spiced Salmon: 6.5 net carbs (for the entire recipe)
